_note: Button numbers verified empirically on PTH-660 (press each key, read xinput test-xi2). They do NOT match libwacom's letter order. Pad buttons only emit keystrokes on X/xf86-input-wacom; mouse-button actions silently fail.
_evdev_note: Raw evdev code name -> xsetwacom button number, verified empirically on PTH-660 (grab event15, press each key). The daemon uses this when it owns the pad (EVIOCGRAB) to turn a BTN_* press into the configured action. BTN_0 is the centre/mode button (never injected).
